highlights.title: Bag Hook
highlights.description: A convenient hook for securely hanging bags or small items while riding.

highlights.description: On-board USB port for charging mobile devices while on the move.

highlights.title: Telescopic Front Suspension
highlights.description: Telescopic front suspension that absorbs road shocks for improved ride comfort and stability.

highlights.title: Single Seat
highlights.description: Comfortable single-piece seat designed for everyday riding.

highlights.title: Saree Guard
highlights.description: Protective saree guard that prevents clothing from getting caught in the rear wheel.

highlights.title: Safety Lock
highlights.description: Secure locking mechanism that enhances vehicle safety.

highlights.title: Large Carrying Space
highlights.description: Spacious utility area for carrying daily essentials or light cargo.

highlights.title: High-Focal Headlight
highlights.description: High-intensity headlight that ensures clear visibility during night rides.

highlights.title: Digital Meter
highlights.description: Digital instrument cluster displaying speed, battery level, and key riding information.

highlights.title: Combi Braking System
highlights.description: Combined braking system that distributes braking force between wheels for safer stopping.

highlights.title: 16-inch Wheels
highlights.description: Large 16-inch wheels designed to provide better stability and road grip.
